$schema: Centralized UI string catalog. Keep production UI text here.

common.notImplemented: This view is part of a later phase.
common.errorBody: We could not complete this action. Please try again.
common.destructive_confirm: This will move the record into the trash. You can restore it from Settings.

onboarding.heading: Privacy and what this is
onboarding.intro: A short note before you start logging.

bullets.scope: This is a family-controlled personal health record. It is not a HIPAA-covered clinical system.
bullets.private: Records are private to invited family users. There are no public links and no third-party analytics on medical text or events.
bullets.softDelete: Records are soft-deleted by default. Destructive deletion requires confirmation and a reason.
bullets.export: The family can export every record at any time.

onboarding.tldr: We capture what you live. We do not diagnose, treat, or share. You can leave the platform with everything, anytime.
onboarding.acknowledge: I understand and want to continue
onboarding.ackPersistedTodo: Acknowledgement is currently stored in this browser. A backend record will replace this in a later phase.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Profile, access, privacy, and export entry points.

profile.readOnlyNotice: Your role is read-only. Capture, edit, and delete actions are not shown.

family.placeholder: Family user list and invitations are part of a later phase.

security.mfaPlaceholder: MFA configuration is part of a later phase.
security.sessionPlaceholder: Session management is part of a later phase.

privacy.replayDescription: View what was shown when this account was first set up.

data.exportPlaceholder: Bulk export will be available once the export generator ships.
data.trashPlaceholder: Soft-deleted records can be reviewed and restored here in a later phase.

install.title: Add Bella to Home Screen
install.body: Open Share, choose Add to Home Screen, and name it Bella.
install.settingsBody: Install Bella from Safari for a full-screen Home Screen app.
install.stepSafari: Open Bella in Safari using the stable HTTPS address.
install.stepShare: Use Share, then Add to Home Screen.
install.stepName: Name it Bella and open it from the Home Screen.

update.title: Update available
update.body: Reload to use the latest app shell.

flags.title: Mobile feature flags
flags.boundaryNote: Flags hide unfinished UI only. Server validation still applies.

offline.title: Offline
offline.body: Open the app again when the connection is back.

painBook.title: Pain log
painBook.subtitle: The daily breviary. Short, fast entries.

empty.title: No pain entries yet
empty.body: Capture today's baseline or your most recent flare. Entries are short by design.

form.title: Title
form.notesPlaceholder: What did this feel like? What changed?
form.pendingUploads: An upload is still in progress. Wait for it to finish before saving.
form.attachmentsEditNote: Existing attachments do not yet appear here. New uploads will attach to this entry.

disclosure.notesHint: Free text — what changed, what helped

quick.heading: Quick entry
quick.hint: Tap a pain digit, then Save. Under fifteen seconds.
quick.moreSheetDescription: Pick any region. The most recent ones stay pinned in the quick row.
quick.validationMissingPain: Add a pain digit, a note, or pick at least one body region first.

logBook.title: Notes
logBook.subtitle: Freeform episodes that don't fit a structured template.

empty.title: No log entries yet
empty.body: Use this for arm freezes, color or temperature changes, ED visits, cognitive episodes, medication reactions, or anything that doesn't slot into the Pain Book.

form.title: Title
form.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Arm froze after BP cuff
form.notesPlaceholder: Describe the episode in your own words. Times, what changed, what you did.
form.pendingUploads: An upload is still in progress. Wait for it to finish before saving.
form.attachmentsEditNote: Existing attachments do not yet appear here. New uploads will attach to this entry.

upload.orMobile: Take a photo or pick a file
upload.fileTypes: Photos, videos, or PDFs up to 50 MB.
upload.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Max 50 MB.

empty.comingSoonBody: This view is part of a later phase. The data model is ready in the backend; the UI lands once its tickets begin.

errors.generic: We could not complete this action. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You need to sign in to continue.
errors.forbidden: Your role doesn't have permission to do this.
errors.session: Your session has expired. Sign in again to continue.

auth.signedOutBody: Bella Care Tracker is private. Use a magic link from your invited email to sign in. Single-user mode is available for local development.

login.demoNotice: Local demo login is prefilled. Use this only with the local Supabase fixture database.

commandPalette.title: Command palette
commandPalette.description: Jump to any page or quickly create an entry.

flareMode.skeletonBody: The active-flare flow lands in a later phase. For now, capture flares as a Pain Book entry with type "Flare".

flare.title: Flare Mode
flare.subtitle: The emergency liturgy. One tap, fixed steps, repeatable in any state.

noActive.title: No active flare
noActive.body: Tap Start flare to capture pain, body regions, triggers, and symptoms now. You can add checkpoints and end the flare later.

errors.noBodyRegions: No body regions are available yet.
errors.needsActiveFlare: There is no active flare to update.
errors.noWriteRole: Your role can't capture flare events. Ask a primary or caregiver.

start.title: Start flare
start.subtitle: Two taps. Add detail later.
start.notesPlaceholder: What did you feel? What happened?

active.noCheckpoints: No checkpoints yet. Capture one below.
active.addCheckpointSubtitle: Quick capture of pain, body, symptoms, and notes.
active.editSubtitle: Adjust title, regions, triggers, and notes.
active.vasomotorSheetDescription: Linked to this flare. Captures left/right photos, temperatures, and color.

checkpoint.title: New checkpoint
checkpoint.notesPlaceholder: Pain quality, what changed, what you tried.

end.title: End flare
end.subtitle: Capture recovery so the summary is honest.
end.recoveryHelp: How long until pain returned to baseline?
end.responsePlaceholder: Interventions tried, what helped or didn't.

vasomotor.title: Photo comparison
vasomotor.subtitle: Side-by-side color and temperature documentation. Pair only — no diagnostic claim.

empty.title: No comparisons yet
empty.body: Capture left/right photos and temperatures during a flare or baseline check. The delta is computed for you.

form.sitePlaceholder: knees, thighs, feet, wrists, hands, arms, custom…
form.deltaPending: Add both temperatures to compute delta.
form.linkEntryHelp: Attach this comparison to the current flare entry.
form.linkEntryNoFlare: No active flare to link to.
form.pendingUploads: An upload is still in progress. Wait for it to finish before saving.
form.missingSite: Add a site name (knees, thighs, feet, etc.).
form.missingPhotosNote: Photos are optional, but capture both sides when you can.
form.photoLeftHint: Use rear camera, even lighting, both sides framed the same.
form.photoRightHint: Match the framing of the left photo. Same distance, same angle.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Every meaningful event in chronological order. The spine the rest of the app hangs from.
timeline.subtitleTimeline: The visual story: pain over time, with medications, procedures, consults, and decisions on parallel tracks.
timeline.subtitleFeed: The chronological list: every captured event, filterable and paginated.

empty.title: Timeline is empty
empty.body: Capture pain entries, flares, photos, decisions, or appointments. They will land here in chronological order.

list.capWarning: Timeline source queries hit the 1000-row safety cap. Results may be incomplete.

diagnoses.title: Diagnostic tree
diagnoses.subtitle: Status, evidence direction, and what would change each branch. The app does not diagnose.

empty.title: No branches yet
empty.body: Add a diagnostic branch to start tracking what is suspected, supported, weakened, or ruled out.

node.advancedNote: Merge and split are part of a later phase.

evidence.notePlaceholder: Optional. Why does this support, weaken, or stay neutral?
evidence.limitationNote: Evidence links are saved and loaded for this branch.

decisions.title: Decisions
decisions.subtitle: Open questions, options, and what would change them. The decision-maker is the family, not the app.

empty.title: No open decisions
empty.body: Add a decision that's pending. Capture the question, options, and what would change it.

emptyAll.title: No decisions yet
emptyAll.body: Capture an open question. Track options, risks, and what would change the call.

form.evidenceLinksPlaceholder: Evidence linking lands in a later phase.
form.title: Title
form.question: Question
form.questionPlaceholder: What needs to be decided, in plain language?
form.optionsNotesPlaceholder: What does this option look like in practice?
form.finalDecisionPlaceholder: Filled in when the decision is made.
form.rationalePlaceholder: Why this call, given what we know.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Appointments, visit prep, and follow-up tasks.

form.purposePlaceholder: Why this visit matters, in one line.
form.prepNotesPlaceholder: Symptom timeline, recent changes, anything to bring up.
form.afterVisitSummaryPlaceholder: What did the clinician say? What changed?

medications.title: Medications
medications.subtitle: Current and past medications, plus how each one actually performed.

form.effectSectionHint: Mark only what you can speak to. Leave the rest blank.
form.name: Name
form.frequencyPlaceholder: e.g. three times daily, as needed
form.sideEffectsPlaceholder: What you have noticed since starting.

response.medicationHelp: Optional. Link to a tracked medication.
response.linkedEntryHelp: Optional. Attach to a recent flare.

procedures.title: Procedures & tests
procedures.subtitle: Capture the diagnostic question and what changed at baseline, immediate, 24h, 72h, 1 week, and 1 month.

empty.title: Nothing recorded yet
empty.body: Add a procedure or test event to track its impact over time.

form.diagnosticSectionHint: Why was this done? What were we trying to learn?
form.impactSectionHint: What changed at each window. Leave blanks for what is not yet known.
form.title: Title
form.sourceHelp: Optional. Link to a visit note, imaging, or lab record.
form.diagnosticQuestionPlaceholder: What were we trying to learn? What outcome would falsify it?
form.baselineBeforePlaceholder: Pain, function, and symptoms in the days before.
form.immediateEffectPlaceholder: What changed during or right after.
form.effect24hPlaceholder: What changed by the next day.
form.repeatRecommendationPlaceholder: Should this be repeated, modified, or skipped next time?

sources.title: Source library
sources.subtitle: Visit notes, imaging, labs, generated reports, and literature. Linkable to events, branches, and decisions.

empty.title: No sources yet
empty.body: Add visit notes, imaging reports, lab reports, generated summaries, or literature.

form.title: Title
form.summaryPlaceholder: What this source says, in your words.
form.attachmentsNewNote: Save the source first to attach files.

links.limitationNote: Source links are saved and loaded for this source.

exportsNs.title: Export packet
exportsNs.subtitle: Generate a clinician-ready markdown packet, or a manifest of every record this family owns.

clinician.intro: Filter the data, preview the markdown, then download.
clinician.noPreview: Generate a packet to preview the markdown.

bulk.intro: Manifest-first archive. Zip assembly is deferred — see the limitations note returned by the backend.
bulk.includeDeletedRoleNote: Available to primary or caregiver roles only.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: What needs attention now.
dashboard.placeholderBody: The dashboard composition lands once timeline, vasomotor, and decision data are wired. Use the navigation to capture entries in the meantime.
dashboard.noActiveFlare: No active flare. Capture starts here when one begins.

empty.today: Nothing scheduled or due right now.
empty.painOverTime: Trends are populated as entries are logged.
empty.trends: Not enough data yet for trends.

emptyCtas.flares: No flares logged in this range.

timelineSeries.title: Multi-track timeline
timelineSeries.subtitle: Pain over time as the spine. Medications, procedures, consults, diagnostic milestones, and decisions on parallel tracks.
timelineSeries.interpretationCaveat: This view shows what was captured. It does not infer cause from co-occurrence.

empty.title: Not enough data yet
empty.body: Capture a few pain entries, medications, or events. They will land on this timeline.

tracks.allHidden: All event tracks are hidden. Re-enable some in the Show menu.
tracks.svgLabel: Event tracks aligned to the pain track timeline.

pain.empty: No pain entries in this window.

sidePanel.title: Day detail
sidePanel.hint: Click a marker or bar to see what happened on that day.

agent.title: Agent Mode
agent.subtitle: A scoped copilot. It can read your family record and propose drafts for your review. It cannot finalize medical records.
agent.boundary: Agent drafts require human approval before becoming records.

threads.title: Threads

empty.title: No threads yet
empty.body: Start a thread to ask the agent about your records or to draft new entries for review.

threads.archiveConfirmBody: Archived threads stay readable but are hidden from the main list. You can switch the filter to see them later.

newThread.title: Start a new agent thread
newThread.titlePlaceholder: Optional. e.g. "Review last flare for visit packet".

chat.emptyThreadTitle: What would you like the agent to do?
chat.emptyThreadBody: Try: "Summarize the last two flares," or "Draft a procedure event for the May 6 hydrodissection." The agent uses read-only tools and can propose drafts only.
chat.noThreadBody: Choose an existing thread on the left, or start a new one.
chat.running: Working on a response. This can take a few seconds while the agent reads records and drafts.
chat.boundary: The agent may search records, summarize them, and propose drafts. It cannot create or modify real records.
chat.composerPlaceholder: Ask the agent. Press ⌘+Enter or Ctrl+Enter to send.
chat.messagesHidden: Some system messages are hidden from this view.

drafts.panelHint: Drafts the agent has proposed in this thread. None of them are saved to your record yet.
drafts.empty: No drafts proposed in this thread yet.

tools.panelHint: Every tool call the agent makes is recorded here. Backend-side, never client-side.
tools.empty: No tool calls recorded in this thread yet.

importNs.title: Import Review
importNs.subtitle: Approve, reject, or revise AI-proposed drafts. Drafts only become records after you commit them here.
importNs.boundary: Committing turns a proposed draft into a real medical record. This is the only place that happens.

empty.title: No drafts to review
empty.body: Agent and import drafts land here for your approval before they become records.

commit.title: Commit this draft as a record?
commit.body: This will create a real {target} in your family record. Soft-delete is still available, but creation is final.

reject.title: Reject this draft?
reject.reasonPlaceholder: Why is this draft being rejected? (required)

edit.title: Edit proposed payload
edit.hint: Edit the JSON below. The draft is re-validated when you save.

importNs.readOnly: Your role can review drafts but not commit them.

appleHealth.title: Apple Health import
appleHealth.subtitle: Import objective Health samples from a manual Apple Health export. Samples and daily summaries are stored alongside the rest of the family record.
appleHealth.boundary: Apple Health data stays separate. It does not create pain entries, log events, diagnoses, or decisions. It is not sent to AI.

upload.title: Upload export.zip
upload.instructions: On iPhone, open Health, tap your profile picture, then “Export All Health Data”. Drop the resulting export.zip here.
upload.safe: Repeat uploads are safe; samples are deduped by their export key.
upload.importing: Importing… large exports can take a minute.
upload.warningBody: Apple Health exports can contain very broad data (steps, heart rate, sleep, workouts, location traces, and more). Unsupported types are skipped, but you should know what you are sharing with this family record.

empty.title: No imports yet
empty.body: Upload your first Apple Health export to populate samples and daily summaries.

summaries.title: Daily summaries
summaries.hint: Chart-ready aggregates rebuilt from imported samples.

empty.title: No summaries yet
empty.body: Run an import to populate daily aggregates.

samples.title: Raw samples
samples.hint: Individual samples as imported. Useful when validating an unfamiliar source.
